request: Choose the best Bead to work on next when graph insights show corrupted metrics.

selected_bead.title: Fix metric calculation pipeline
selected_bead.reason: It has reliable complete metrics including high betweenness and unblocks three downstream Beads, while bd-301 had corrupted metrics in triage.

commands_used.why: Initial triage to assess recommendations and readiness.
Cross-validate metrics after detecting incomplete data in triage.

rejected_candidates.reason: Missing pagerank in triage and flagged for metric corruption in insights.
